progress.modelNote: every bar reserves its last 20% as a test & rework buffer (hatched) — it only fills once the stream is tested in production; build progress alone can never reach 100%
progress.scopeNote: scope expanded 2026-06-11 after the first full review: admin ops wiring, portal redesigns, localization and DB-integration tests added — overall % dropped accordingly. New productroadmap.md items added after this date lower the affected workstream automatically.

moneyLoop.label: reconciliation
moneyLoop.warn: amount not yet checked — matching is by reference only

decisions.title: One monthly bill
decisions.detail: all purchases roll into a single payment reference due at month-end — one transfer clears everything

decisions.title: Month-end due dates
decisions.detail: every installment lands on a calendar month-end, never odd mid-month dates

decisions.title: Plan belongs to the merchant
decisions.detail: stores choose 1 or 3 monthly payments — shoppers never pick a plan at checkout

decisions.title: Customers pay Qisto, never the store
decisions.detail: repayments go to Qisto by bank transfer and are reconciled by reference — merchants are settled separately

decisions.title: Zero interest, merchant-financed
decisions.detail: customers pay no interest or fees — Qisto earns a 7% merchant fee per sale

decisions.title: Credit ladder
decisions.detail: down payment shrinks as customers repay on time — 60% for new customers down to 25% for trusted ones

shipped.text: full repayment cycle live — customer reports a transfer, admin reconciles, ledger posts, credit restores, loan closes
consolidated monthly bill — one reference per customer per month across all purchases and merchants
mobile app wired to the live API — login, KYC, wallet, scan-to-pay, monthly statement — with the Ink Royale design and animated splash
month-end installment model — plans owned by merchants, schedules generated automatically
critical role-check vulnerability found by adversarial audit, fixed and verified in production the same day
double-entry accounting ledger with balanced-posting guarantees behind every money movement

now.label: gate dev login bypass to non-production
wire admin console to live endpoints
pick one settlement model, align docs with code

next.label: DB-backed integration tests — recon, settlement, idempotency
Arabic + RTL + SYP amounts across the customer app
